chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH BENCH AT SUKKUR Cr. Misc. App. No. S – 181 of 2024 Date of hearing Order with signature of Judge Hearing of case 1. For orders on office objection at Flag-A 2. For hearing of main case 3. For hearing of MA No.1715/2024 (S/A) 27.05.2024 Mr. Riaz Ali Shaikh, Advocate for applicant. Mr. Ziaul Haque Kamboh, Advocate for respondent No.5. Mr. Gulzar Ahmed Malano, Assistant Prosecutor General..-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.- Learned Counsel for applicant does not press this miscellaneous application as the FIR against the applicant has already been registered. Accordingly, this miscellaneous application is dismissed as not pressed along with listed application. J U D G E Abdul Basit
